svg.text: Chorus + Pulse — TO-BE: one memory architecture, three tiers, all off the spine
Same grammar, three access axes: working = by who (now) · domain knowledge = by what (subject) · long-term = by cue (corpus). Crawl lives in knowledge.
Extends chorus-search-tobe.svg with the pulse relationship + crawl-in-knowledge. North star (direction), not the immediate fix. Wren · 2026-05-24
chorus-api · :3340 — THE COORDINATION SPINE (kept free)
single event loop · only fast bounded coordination · it ASKS each tier, it never RUNS heavy work on its loop
— async boundary: every tier below runs OFF the loop; the spine only asks —
WORKING MEMORY · pulse
indexed by WHO · "where is everyone right now"
/pulse/roles/<role>/
cards · messages · streams · alerts
streams = tool turns + results (the gemba surface)
one index: role. team view = the union.
• the Clearing's live surface
• ephemeral signals assembled off-loop
• ~14ms warm read
serves: Directing
coordinate against the present
AX emphasis: WHEN (age / freshness)
so an agent knows if it's 2s or 2min stale before reasoning
home: ephemeral producers
role-state files · board · nudges · 60s spine tail
no durable store of its own — it aggregates (that's why pulse caches a file)
DOMAIN KNOWLEDGE · chorus:knowledge
indexed by WHAT · "what do we know about photos"
/knowledge/<domain>
cards · facts · mentions · code, for one subject
"crawl" was the mechanism; knowledge is the resource
crawl fits HERE — as the COMPOSER
• composes async from the homes — no stored snapshot
• graph-backed; reads working + index for the rest
• decoupled from pulse + from search-index-stuffing
• off the loop; the sync post-processing leaves the spine
this is the discovery surface — replaces #2019 index-stuffing
serves: Shaping + Designing (the as-is/to-be of a subject)
AX emphasis: STRUCTURE + PROVENANCE
how things connect, and where each fact came from
home: the GRAPH (Fuseki, urn:gathering:*)
domain knowledge already persists here — its true home
crawl emits to loom + roles when a domain changes (hydrate / notify)
LONG-TERM MEMORY · chorus:search
indexed by CUE · "have we ever…"
/search (capability, worker pool)
lexical · semantic · structured — one door
a search bug degrades search only, never the spine
• off the spine (own service / pool)
• honest integration — like-with-like
• retires naive `unified` RRF blend
corpora: messages · memory · life graph
spans what the team DID + what it works ON (your life)
serves: all three steps reach in
AX emphasis: COVERAGE
how much of the corpus this answer actually saw
home: SQLite FTS (1.1G) + LanceDB (21G)
+ Gathering life graph (first-class, not evicted)
continuous indexing = its consolidation step
context_inject + agents read across all three
one grammar, three axes — learn it once, read every tier
crawl composes from: graph (its home) + working (live ops) + index (code)
each part read from its own home, async — never a 4th copy
search indexes the homes (incl. knowledge/graph)
so "have we ever" still reaches domain knowledge
ONE AX ENVELOPE across all three — every datum carries: what (semantic name) · where (provenance) · when (age + tier) · version (schema)
The agents are the consumers; the API is their harness. Each tier emphasizes one field — working: when · knowledge: structure/provenance · long-term: coverage.
loom is consolidated FROM these surfaces → semantically clean APIs in = a loom agents can reason over, not recite. AX quality is upstream of team intelligence.
The architecture in one breath
Three memory tiers, all off the coordination spine, one grammar. Pulse is working memory (by who, now). Knowledge is domain memory (by what) — graph-backed,
and crawl is the composer that serves it, not a tenant of pulse or search. Search is long-term recall (by cue) over the corpus + your life graph.
• Pulse ↔ Knowledge ↔ Search are siblings, not a pipeline — different data, different access, no copies between them.
• Crawl re-homes into knowledge — off the loop, graph-backed, composed async; the #2019 search-index-stuffing retires.
• The tiers map to your value stream — working→Directing, knowledge→Shaping+Designing, long-term→all three reach in.
This is the north star — NOT the immediate build
Now (the loop-blocker fix): bound or yield the remaining SYNCHRONOUS work in the crawl handler so it stops freezing the loop — the #3054 pattern, finished. Measure which
sync step dominates on photos first; fix that one. No snapshot store (doubling down on bad), no /knowledge rebuild (overly ambitious).
Later (this diagram): re-home crawl into /knowledge, graph-backed, composed async; build the AX envelope; the role/domain-indexed surfaces. Direction, sequenced after the bleed stops.
Extends chorus-search-tobe.svg · drawn to be argued with · LIVE/TO-BE badges added #3065 · Wren · 2026-05-24
